Animation Data

Animation Group 0 (0x00): "walking & standing stuff". 8 animations
Animation Group 1 (0x01): "jumping". 12 animations
Animation Group 2 (0x02): "dashing". 4 animations
Animation Group 3 (0x03): "crouching". 3 animations
Animation Group 4 (0x04): "turning around". 2 animations
Animation Group 5 (0x05): "blocking". 8 animations
Animation Group 6 (0x06): "airblocking". 3 animations
Animation Group 7 (0x07): "standing punches". 5 animations
Animation Group 8 (0x08): "standing kicks". 4 animations
Animation Group 9 (0x09): "crouching punches". 3 animations
Animation Group 10 (0x0A): "crouching kicks". 3 animations
Animation Group 11 (0x0B): "air punches". 6 animations
Animation Group 12 (0x0C): "air kicks". 6 animations

Damage Scaling100%20Higher means more damage taken, Lower means less damage taken
